name: Azure - Granting Of Permissions To An Account
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Azure Platform
when the event matches Operation Name (custom) is any of MICROSOFT.AUTHORIZATION/ROLEASSIGNMENTS/WRITE
TD_list: APPLY Azure - Granting Of Permissions To An Account on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Azure Platform
AND when the event matches Operation Name (custom) is any of MICROSOFT.AUTHORIZATION/ROLEASSIGNMENTS/WRITE
RED_list: Event name: Azure -Granting Of Permissions To An Account
Event description: Identifies IPs from which users grant access to other users on azure resources and alerts when a previously unseen source IP address is used.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
Include detected events by "Username" from this point forward, in the offense, for 300 second(s)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
